author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: We need to expand the Pi agent extension to include advanced ergonomics, such as higher-level workflow presets and additional tooling integrations. This aligns with the post-v0.1 roadmap.
M5 roadmap: Pi agent extension advanced ergonomics
Implement higher-level workflow presets and additional tooling integrations for the Pi agent extension.
Pi agent extension supports higher-level workflow presets and additional tooling integrations.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Why this exists: Complete the roadmap items for post-v0.1.

value.text: Initial plan: design workflow presets for pi extension.
